claim_boundary: V1.1 remained preproduction and no remote model training was launched from it.
reason: V1.1 run and stage bindings omitted multiple result-affecting model, loss, optimizer, scheduler and runtime fields, so an incompatible resume could be accepted.
V1.1 OOF promotion required bootstrap CI lower bounds and MAE improvement, which did not match the frozen PREREGISTRATION_V1_1_IMPLEMENTATION_AMENDMENT promotion gate.
